steps.title: Identify the correction pattern
steps.content: The sentence first says Chaucer did not write in Modern English. The clause after the semicolon gives the replacement idea: he wrote in Middle English.

steps.title: Choose a replacement signal
steps.content: B would signal cause, C would signal similarity, and D would signal sequence. A transition meaning instead fits the not this, but this structure of the sentence. The answer is A.
